mapper.sql: id, day, high, low, open, close, code, last_close, offset_value, offset_rate, turnover_rate, turnover, turnover_value, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: insert into stock_condition (id, day, high, low, open, close, code, last_close, offset_value, offset_rate, turnover_rate, turnover, turnover_value, created_time, updated_time ) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{day,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{high,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{open,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{close,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastClose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{offsetValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{offsetRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{turnoverRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{turnover,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{turnoverValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
update stock_condition
day = #{day,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
high = #{high,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
low = #{low,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
open = #{open,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
close = #{close,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_close = #{lastClose,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
offset_value = #{offsetValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
offset_rate = #{offsetRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
turnover_rate = #{turnoverRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
turnover = #{turnover,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
turnover_value = #{turnoverValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update stock_condition set day = #{day,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, high = #{high,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, low = #{low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, open = #{open,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, close = #{close,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_close = #{lastClose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, offset_value = #{offsetValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, offset_rate = #{offsetRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, turnover_rate = #{turnoverRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, turnover = #{turnover,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, turnover_value = #{turnoverValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into stock_condition (id, day, high, low, open, close, code, last_close, offset_value, offset_rate, turnover_rate, turnover, turnover_value, created_time, updated_time) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.day,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.high,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.open,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.close,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastClose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.offsetValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.offsetRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.turnoverRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.turnover,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.turnoverValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.delete:
delete from stock_condition where id in
#{item}
